response.content: {"statements": [{"statement": "The Corolla's engines typically run on 0W-16 or 0W-20 full-synthetic oil.", "reason": "See retrieved context.", "verdict": 1}, {"statement": "An oil and filter change is recommended every 10,000 km or 12 months under normal driving.", "reason": "See retrieved context.", "verdict": 1}, {"statement": "Vehicles under severe conditions such as short trips, towing, or dust should be serviced closer to every 5,000 km.", "reason": "See retrieved context.", "verdict": 1}, {"statement": "Using synthetic oil also improves fuel economy by roughly 5%.", "reason": "See retrieved context.", "verdict": 0}]}
